title: Problems encountered when using the natural right join and concatws functions together
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER NOT NULL, c2 TEXT DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(c1));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 REAL NOT NULL, c4 DATE DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(c3));
SELECT t1.c2 FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.c1 = t2.c3 WHERE (NOT (t2.c3 || (t1.c2 IS NOT NULL AND t2.c4 IS NOT NULL)));
key_bug_features: NATURAL RIGHT JOIN with CONCAT_WS function
